mapper.sql: id, category_id, name, subtitle, main_image, images, detail, price, stock, status, sales_count, has_sku, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mall_product ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM mall_product WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT , MATCH(name, subtitle) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) AS relevance FROM mall_product WHERE MATCH(name, subtitle) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) AND status = 1 ORDER BY relevance DESC, sales_count DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mall_product (category_id, name, subtitle, main_image, images, detail, price, stock, status, has_sku) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{subtitle}, #{mainImage}, #{images}, #{detail}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{status}, #{hasSku})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mall_product WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.update: UPDATE mall_product SET stock = stock + #{quantity}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE mall_product SET sales_count = sales_count + #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE mall_product SET sales_count = GREATEST(sales_count - #{quantity}, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM mall_product WHERE id IN
#{id}
